isolation.storageReset: cookies, localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB cleared before testing

assertions.title: Rotate button on profile row navigates to Rotate Keyset

steps.action: Open returning-user Welcome at / with one saved profile
steps.expected: Profile row shows a distinct Rotate button
steps.observed: Profile row showed only Unlock action; no Rotate button present

steps.expected: Rotate action navigates to /rotate-keyset with selected keyset name preloaded
steps.observed: Unlock modal opened on / and did not navigate to Rotate Keyset

evidence.network: No /api requests captured; SPA state only

assertions.issues: Rotate button required by contract was not rendered in returning-user profile row; navigation target could not be triggered from Welcome.

assertions.title: Rotate Keyset form renders with source share cards, new config controls, 3-step stepper, info callout

steps.expected: Rotate Keyset form renders all specified controls and callout
steps.observed: Form rendered with 3-step stepper (step 1 active), Source Share #1 validated card, Source Share #2 inputs, Shares Collected bar, threshold/total steppers, Validate & Continue button, and blue info callout

evidence.network: No /api requests captured; route render is SPA-driven

assertions.title: Review & Generate screen renders with amber warning, distribution password inputs, red action button

steps.action: From /rotate-keyset, click Validate & Continue to reach /rotate-keyset/review
steps.expected: Review screen shows amber warning, password + confirm inputs, red Rotate & Generate Keyset button, step 1 active
steps.observed: All required elements rendered, including amber warning callout, both password fields, and destructive red action button

evidence.network: No /api requests captured; SPA route transition

assertions.title: Rotation Generation Progress renders with 4-phase checklist (differs from Create's 3 phases)

steps.expected: Progress card shows 4 named phases and 'N of 4 phases'
steps.observed: Displayed phases: Process Source Shares, Recover Existing Key, Generate Fresh Shares, Prepare Rotated Shares; overall progress showed 0 of 4 phases

assertions.title: Wrong Password error screen renders with failed source share details and retry button

steps.expected: Source Share Error screen with failed share details, wrong-password banner, and Retry button
steps.observed: Rendered Source Share Error title, failed Source Share #2 card, wrong-password error message, and Retry button with back navigation present

assertions.title: Group Mismatch error screen renders with contrasting group key display and back navigation

steps.expected: Source Group Mismatch screen with contrasting group-key displays and back action
steps.observed: Rendered mismatch card with two contrasting group key values and Back to Source Intake button

assertions.title: Generation Failed error screen renders with failed phase highlighted and safety reassurance banner

steps.expected: Generation Failed screen with failed phase highlighted, completed phases, green reassurance banner, Retry Generation button
steps.observed: Rendered failed phase with Failed label, completed phases above, green reassurance banner, and Retry Generation button

frictions.description: To create returning-user state in headless flow, Finish Distribution remained disabled until each QR modal in Create/Distribute was opened and dismissed with Done.
frictions.resolution: Opened and dismissed both QR modals, then completed distribution and locked dashboard to return to Welcome.

summary: Tested 7 assigned assertions: 6 passed and 1 failed. Failure was VAL-WELCOME-010 because Rotate action was not available on the returning-user profile row and click path opened Unlock modal instead of navigating to Rotate Keyset.
